query: Satya Nadella Mustafa Suleyman Jacob Andreou Microsoft AI leadership reorganization Copilot products large language models 2026

{"query":"Satya Nadella Mustafa Suleyman Jacob Andreou Microsoft AI leadership reorganization Copilot products large language models 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1961,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/03/17/announcing-copilot-leadership-update/","title":"Announcing Copilot leadership update - The Official Microsoft Blog","content":"Jacob Andreou will lead the Copilot experience across consumer and commercial, driving design, product, growth, and engineering, as EVP, Copilot, reporting to me.
Mustafa is uniquely qualified to drive this forward, with his deep focus and commitment to advancing the frontiers of model science, while also ensuring that human control, agency, and economic opportunity remain at the center of these advancements.
These models will enable us to build enterprise tuned lineages that help improve all our products across the company.
They’ll also enable us to deliver the COGS efficiencies necessary to be able to serve AI workloads at the immense scale required in the coming years."},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/17/microsoft-copilot-ai-suleyman.html","title":"Microsoft shakes up Copilot AI leadership team, freeing up Suleyman","content":"- Former Snap executive Jacob Andreou will be in charge of the Copilot AI assistant experience for commercial and consumer clients, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said in a memo.
- Mustafa Suleyman, head of the Microsoft AI group, will focus more on developing generative AI models.
The company also celebrated its 50th anniversary.
Microsoft said Tuesday that it’s bringing together the engineering groups for its commercial and consumer Copilot assistants, which have yet to gain broad adoption."},{"url":"https://samexpert.com/microsoft-copilot-reorganisation-march-2026/","title":"Inside Microsoft's March 2026 Copilot Reorg | SAMexpert Blog","content":"Consumer and commercial Copilot were unified under one leadership team.
On 12 March 2026, Microsoft announced that Rajesh Jha, Executive Vice President of Experiences + Devices, would retire after 35 years at the company.
He will step down on 1 July 2026 and stay on in an advisory role.
Jeff Teper was promoted to EVP, and Sumit Chauhan and Kirk Koenigsbauer were promoted to President.
LinkedIn CEO Ryan Roslansky's role was expanded to also lead Microsoft Office and the M365 Copilot app, initially reporting to Jha.
Microsoft reported 15 million paid M365 Copilot seats at the Q2 FY2026 earnings call in January 2026, with seat growth up more than 160 percent year-over-year.
In the paid AI chatbot subscriber market (January 2026), Copilot's share contracted from 18.8% in July 2025 to 11.5% (Recon Analytics data), a 39% contraction in just six months, while ChatGPT held 55.2% and Gemini 15.7%.
Andreou spent eight years scaling Snap from 80 million to 360 million DAU.
In March 2024, Microsoft hired Suleyman together with Inflection's Chief Scientist Karén Simonyan and several other Inflection team members.
As of March 2026, Microsoft has not shipped a frontier-class large language model.
Custom silicon, GB200 clusters, and Fairwater
The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector exchange-traded fund (IGV) was down approximately 19% year-to-date in March 2026."},{"url":"https://robquickenden.blog/2026/03/microsoft2026-copilotreorg/","title":"What the Microsoft Copilot Leadership Reorg means. – Robs Tech and AI Blog","content":"Mustafa Suleyman (Microsoft Chief AI Man) will still lead and drive this forward, supported by Ryan Roslansky, Perry Clarke, and Charles Lamanna who will lead the M365 apps and the Copilot platform.
Read Microsoft’s official announcement for the full details."},{"url":"https://www.geekwire.com/2026/microsoft-revamps-copilot-structure-elevating-former-snap-exec-as-suleyman-shifts-to-ai-models/","title":"Microsoft revamps Copilot structure, elevating former Snap exec as Suleyman shifts to AI models – GeekWire","content":"As executive vice president of the combined Copilot group, he will report directly to Nadella, leading overall design, product, growth, and engineering.
Suleyman, a co-founder of DeepMind, joined Microsoft as CEO of AI when the company brought over most of the team from his AI startup Inflection AI in 2024."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Satya Nadella Mustafa Suleyman Jacob Andreou Microsoft AI leadership reorganization Copilot products large language models 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.geekwire.com/2026/microsoft-revamps-copilot-structure-elevating-former-snap-exec-as-suleyman-shifts-to-ai-models","title":"Microsoft revamps Copilot structure, elevating former Snap exec as Suleyman shifts to AI models – GeekWire","content":"Mustafa Suleyman, CEO of Microsoft AI, will shift his focus to building frontier AI models and leading the company’s superintelligence efforts under a reorganization announced Tuesday. Microsoft is reorganizing its Copilot organization, unifying its consumer and commercial AI efforts under former Snap executive Jacob Andreou while narrowing the role of Microsoft AI leader Mustafa Suleyman to focus on the superintelligence and frontier models. The news, announced Tuesday by Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella, is a new attempt by the company to gain traction as AI shifts from chatbots that converse with users to agents that take action on their behalf. “This is how we move from a collection of great products to a truly integrated system, one that is simpler and more powerful for customers,” Nadella said in an email to employees about the changes, published by the company on its website. Suleyman, a co-founder of DeepMind, joined Microsoft as CEO of AI when the company brought over most of the team from his AI startup Inflection AI in 2024.","score":0.9159971,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/17/microsoft-copilot-ai-suleyman.html","title":"Microsoft shakes up Copilot AI leadership team, freeing up Suleyman","content":"Microsoft said Tuesday that it's bringing together the engineering groups for its commercial and consumer Copilot assistants, which have yet to gain broad adoption. Jacob Andreou, a former Snap executive who works in Microsoft's artificial intelligence unit, will become an executive vice president in charge of the consumer and commercial Copilot experience, CEO Satya Nadella wrote in a memo to employees. The Copilot moves will free up executive Mustafa Suleyman, a former co-founder of AI lab DeepMind that Google bought in 2014, to focus more on building new models. \"The next phase of this plan is to restructure our organization to enable me to focus all my energy on our Superintelligence efforts and be able to deliver world class models for Microsoft over the next 5 years,\" Suleyman wrote in a memo. \"We are doubling down on our superintelligence mission with the talent and compute to build models that have real product impact, in terms of evals, COGS reduction, as well as advancing the frontier when it comes to meeting enterprise needs and achieving the next set of research breakthroughs,\" Nadella wrote.","score":0.9006087,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://samexpert.com/microsoft-copilot-reorganisation-march-2026","title":"Inside Microsoft's March 2026 Copilot Reorg","content":"# Microsoft's Copilot Reorganisation. On 17 March 2026, Satya Nadella announced the most significant restructuring of Microsoft's AI organisation since the company hired Mustafa Suleyman two years earlier. Consumer and commercial Copilot were unified under one leadership team. Suleyman stepped back from day-to-day product leadership to focus on building in-house AI models, and a new generation of executives took the reins. Five days before that, Rajesh Jha, the Executive Vice President (EVP) who had led Microsoft's Experiences + Devices division for years, announced his retirement after 35 years at the company. Here is what happened, who the new leaders are, what their track records tell us about the direction ahead, and what it all means for the organisations that depend on Microsoft's products every day. On 12 March 2026, Microsoft announced that Rajesh Jha, Executive Vice President of Experiences + Devices, would retire after 35 years at the company.","score":0.90039873,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.bizjournals.com/sanjose/news/2026/03/17/microsoft-copilot-reorganization-2026.html","title":"Microsoft combined its consumer and business Copilot teams","content":"Jacob Andreou was named executive vice president of Copilot and reports to Satya Nadella. Mustafa Suleyman will focus on developing large-scale","score":0.8479807,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.crn.com/news/ai/2026/microsoft-reorganizes-copilot-team-names-jacob-andreou-evp-reporting-to-ceo-nadella","title":"Microsoft Reorganizes Copilot Team, Names Jacob Andreou EVP Reporting To CEO Nadella","content":"*‘This is how we move from a collection of great products to a truly integrated system, one that is simpler and more powerful for customers,’ says Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella.*. Microsoft is looking to better unify innovation of its Copilot artificial intelligence product across commercial and consumer users with an internal restructuring that promotes one executive and creates four new pillars within the technology giant–with alignments expected “over the next few weeks” as part of the changes. “This is how we move from a collection of great products to a truly integrated system, one that is simpler and more powerful for customers,” Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said in a blog post about the changes Tuesday. Nadella disclosed in the Tuesday blog post that as part of the changes, Microsoft has promoted Jacob Andreou (pictured above) to the role of Copilot executive vice president. Andreou–who has been with Microsoft for about a year, previously serving as corporate vice president of product and growth within the Microsoft AI division–will report directly to CEO Nadella.","score":0.82694983,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.9,"request_id":"2b0eb759-3338-4e26-99a8-9fe5acc8408c"}
